tests.fallback_command:
sh -lc 'mkdir -p /tmp/tamandua-persistence; cat > /tmp/tamandua-persistence/com.tamandua.benchmark.plist <<EOF
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0"><dict><key>Label</key><string>com.tamandua.benchmark</string></dict></plist>
EOF
plutil -lint /tmp/tamandua-persistence/com.tamandua.benchmark.plist >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; rm -rf /tmp/tamandua-persistence'
tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
